item.title: Luxury Fashion’s Sustainability Future Will Be Built On Accountability
item.description: Luxury fashion is shifting to accountability, where durability, design, and systems thinking redefine sustainability, driven by consumer demand and me...

item.title: Billionaires Want Your Medical Records — And They Don’t Want To Pay For Them
item.description: The question is not whether it will be used — it is who owns it, who benefits from it, and whether patients are participants or simply sources.

item.title: Anthropic Leader Speaks On AI Progress
item.description: Anthropic frames AI safety as mission: open economic data, equity focus, and rapid agent-driven diffusion.

item.title: 6 Questions To Ask Before Turning Management Duties Over To AI
item.description: Human management may be messy at times, but is AI any better? Here are six tips from business leaders and questions to weigh whether AI has what it ta...

item.title: Digit Gets A Job: Agility Robotics And Toyota Sign Robots-As-A-Service Deal
item.description: The humanoid robots are coming! Agility Robotics' Digit gets yet another paying job ... this time making RAV4s with Toyota.
